feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Fiori
feed.subtitle: SAP Fiori Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Cannot select OverflowToolbar in Fiori Adaption
entry.content:
Hey there,

i created an adaption project for Fiori App Process Purchase Requisition F1048.

I want to add an custom button to the toolbar, but I cannot select the toolbar in the visual editor. I just can select the table.
At the moment I have no changes in the project.

entry.title: Unable to delete custom field due to external use of the field
entry.content:
Hello,

in the sandbox system we have created a Custom field for a test. This test never took place. The custom field was just maintained in a Top-Down-Template and some postings were made. I have already deleted the template and reversed the postings. I also disabled every field in “Custom Fields” but when trying to delete this field this message comes up: “            FGL_BCF*       Field is used in the balance carryforward views. See SAP Note 2762837.”  We have tried to execute the report from SAP Note 2762837 but there comes up a new message: “Publish canceled because custom field * is externally used.” We are blocked e.g., when trying to run allocation cycles. That is why this field needs to be deleted as soon as possible. Do you have a solution for this issue?

Thank you and best regards

Felix

entry.title: While developing the UI5 application in BAS, can we inspect?
entry.content:
While developing the UI5 application in BAS, can we inspect using ESLINT or other tools? 

I have used ESLINT in VS Code for VueJS projects. Can someone suggest what tool can be use in BAS for Fiori Projects?

 

#BAS, #BTP, #Mobile, #Fiori

entry.title: To implement CICD Pipeine for Fiori Projects
entry.content:
Hi, I want to implement CICD Pipeline for Fiori Freestyle projects

I have followed the tutorials i am able to connect with GitHub and CICD and even webhook is triggered.

The Github is failing because recently we have with extra security when we push the code from BAS to Github to main it will generate OTP for access the repository. due to this step its failing.

Do anyone has the similar issue or if you have implemented can you help me?

entry.title: How to set initial focus on Fiori Floor Plan Analytics List Page?
entry.content:
Hi Colleagues,

I have been working on Fiori Floor Plan Analytics List Page(Fiori elements v4).

As per the Fiori guidelines, also shown in the screenshot below, it says that "If the visual filter bar is visible by default, set the focus on the first chart container". How can that be achieved if the application is fiori element based?

 

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Issue with API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV/AttachmentContent POST call
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I am trying to do POST call AttachmentContent

Question: Here i am converting file data to Binary and then posing to standard api API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV/AttachmentContent,  i am able to upload file to sales order but content updated is empty. Kindly help me if anything wrong in this code.

Here is my UploadSet View and controller code

Spoiler
<upload:UploadSet
id="UploadSet"
instantUpload="false"
showIcons="true"
uploadEnabled="true"
afterItemAdded="onAfterItemAdded"
afterItemRemoved="onRemoveFile"
fileRenamed="onFileRename"
terminationEnabled="true"
maxFileNameLength="30"
maxFileSize="100"
uploadUrl="/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV/AttachmentContentSet"
items="{UtilityModel>/AttachmentData}"
mode="None">
<upload:toolbar>
<OverflowToolbar id="_IDGenOverflowTolbar1">
<ToolbarSpacer id="_IDGenToolbpacer1"/>
<upload:UploadSetToolbarPlaceholder id="_IDGenUploadSetToolbarPlaceholder1" />
</OverflowToolbar>
</upload:toolbar>
<upload:items>
<upload:UploadSetItem
id="_IDGenUploadSktItem1"
fileName="{UtilityModel>FileName}"
mediaType="{UtilityModel>MimeType}"
url="/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV/AttachmentContentSet(DocumentInfoRecordDocType='{UtilityModel>DocumentInfoRecordDocType}',DocumentInfoRecordDocNumber='{UtilityModel>DocumentInfoRecordDocNumber}',DocumentInfoRecordDocVersion='{UtilityModel>DocumentInfoRecordDocVersion}',DocumentInfoRecordDocPart='{UtilityModel>DocumentInfoRecordDocPart}',LogicalDocument='{UtilityModel>LogicalDocument}',ArchiveDocumentID='{UtilityModel>ArchiveDocumentID}',LinkedSAPObjectKey='{UtilityModel>LinkedSAPObjectKey}',BusinessObjectTypeName='{UtilityModel>BusinessObjectTypeName}')/$value"
>
</upload:UploadSetItem>
</upload:items>
</upload:UploadSet>

 

Spoiler
onAfterItemAdded: function (oEvent) {

                var fileItem = oEvent.getParameter("item");
                var oModel = this.getOwnerComponent().getModel("apiAttachmentService");

                // Create a Blob from the file
                var fileData = new Blob([fileItem.getFileObject()]);

                // Read the file content as an ArrayBuffer
                var buf = function getBuffer(resolve) {
                    var reader = new FileReader();
                    reader.onload = function () {
                        var arrayBuffer = reader.result;
                        resolve(arrayBuffer);
                    };
                    reader.readAsArrayBuffer(fileData);
                };

                var promise = new Promise(buf);
                promise.then(function (arrayBuffer) {
                    // Convert the ArrayBuffer to Base64
                    var binaryString = '';
                    var bytes = new Uint8Array(arrayBuffer);
                    var length = bytes.byteLength;
                    for (var i = 0; i < length; i++) {
                        binaryString += String.fromCharCode(bytes[i]);
                    }
                    var base64Data = btoa(binaryString);

                    oModel.setHeaders({
                        "LinkedSAPObjectKey": "0070000117",
                        "BusinessObjectTypeName": "BUS2096",
                        "Content-Type": fileItem.getMediaType(),
                        "Slug": fileItem.getFileName()
                    });

                    // Create a new entry in AttachmentContentSet
                    oModel.create("/AttachmentContentSet", null, {
                        "Content": base64Data
                    }, {
                        success: function (oData) {
                            debugger;
                        },
                        error: function (oError) {
                            debugger;
                        }
                    });
                    this.byId("UploadSet").upload();
                }.bind(this));
}

entry.title: BTP Alerts when a new BTP role is created in CF
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Using API we are creating/deleting a role in BTP CF. Is it possible to trigger btp alerts instance whenever a role is created or deleted?

Thanks,

Gowtham

entry.title: Standard Fiori app -Delivery Performance-Net Value filter options not available
entry.content:
Hello All,

can someone advise if anyone experience such type of scenario .

Issue : Standard Fiori app(Delivery Performance ) -Is there a solution to filter the Amount or Net value in standard Fiori apps where Net Value = 0.00. I need to exclude them from the report. As I couldn't find the Net Value in Adapt filter to exclude or Neither in the list report .I can only find ascending or descending only.

Even tried with the option below to filter the value for Net Value but there is no field available 

This will help my orders count to ignore the Net value with zero amount when i saved this as a tile .

Any thoughts on this.

entry.title: SAPUI5: create custom library to use across different apps across a sapui5 mta project.
entry.content:
I need to create a comprehensive SAPUI5 app with workflows and stuff. I have a create workflow and an approval workflow, both have the same forms. So in order to apply dry, I am trying to create a custom library in my sapui5 project. I want the components in the library to be accessed by any applications in my project(code reusability).
I have found answers like this
https://stackoverflow.com/questions/53635156/using-a-sapui5-library-in-another-project
https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/step-by-step-procedure-to-create-sapui5-library-with-custom-controls-and/ba-p/13353169
https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/sdk/#/topic/6314fcd2510648fbaad3cee8a421030d.html
but couldn't find a complete solution. I guess there is a way to create a custom library from the cloud IDE itself.
If anyone can share any docs or guides on how to do it, would be really helpful.
The current project structure is attached. Next, I am gonna create an approval workflow so any help would be really helpful.

I found out that I can create a library with generator-easy-ui5 npm package, now I wanna know how to consume it in my apps.
Please check the folder structure I uploaded

entry.title: In Fiori MyInbox, where can we see the 'Deadline Messages' similar to Business Workplace
entry.content:
Hello All,
How can we see the 'deadline messages' in Fiori MyInbox application (App ID F0862).

Currently I am able to see the following filters in the fiori app:

 

Filter By

 - Priority
 - Due On
 - Status
 - Created On
 - My Tasks and Tasks on Behalf Of
 - Task Type

 

Is it possible to add a new Filter,maybe via Flexible workflows?
Do I need to enhance the standard app in BAS to add a new Filter?
Do we also need to enhance its corresponding backend class?

entry.title: Fiori Elements UI not using OData V2 : CAP
entry.content:
Hi I have developed an CAP project where the it has a service and some entities. I have used 

@Sap/cds-odata-v2-adapter-proxy to change to CAP Odata to V2. Now the service is served by 2 URLs, "service/<Entity>" , "v2/service/<Entity>. When I develop a Fiori elements based application on top of this CAP app, it defaults to OData V4.
manifest.json
 
"dataSources": {
     "mainService": {
          "uri": "/service/",
          "type": "OData",
          "settings": { "annotations": [], "odataVersion": "4.0" }
     }
}
 
I tried to replace the URI to "/v2/service" , but UI is not getting initialized, rather it throws error on OData Meta Model ( I think it is specific to OData V4 ).

Please let me know what is the fix.

entry.title: SAP Alert Notifications when new user is created
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Using API we are creating/deleting a user in BTP CF. Is it possible to trigger btp notification alerts whenever a user is deleted or created?

I have subscribed to alert notification services in subaccount. I have to define the condition in the alert notification subscription. How to define for the above scenario

Is there any doc/blog/tutorial for this? Please help

Thanks,

Gowtham

entry.title: How can we call cpi iFlow endpoint directly from an UI5 App using Bearer Token?
How to make sapui5 treetable expanded by default in a list report app.
entry.content:
Hello Folkes!

I am new to sap ui5, I would like  to know, In a List Report App, how I can get all nodes expanded without having to do it manually on click of Go button, and once all nodes are expanded user can collapse the nodes or keep them as it is.

How can I achieve this functionality?
Please refer screenshot attached for better understanding.
Note: I came across this property : initialExpansionLevel, but not sure how to use it.
 

I have used property :-

 "tableType":"TreeTable",  in Manifest.

entry.title: Blank serial number on customer report
entry.content:
Hi All,

I'm new here, and I'm a sales Admin. 

I'm facing an issue while generating the maintenance report for a newly installed machine the serial number is showing blank, although inside the service order itself it's showing clearly. 

Any idea what could be the problem and how can be fixed. (This is the first time i experience this issue)
Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Fiori APP: Post Goods Receipt for Inbound Delivery
entry.content:
Hello SAP Support,

I would like to customize the layout of the Goods Receipt for inbound deliveries app. For example, hide some fields that I don't need and re-sort the items.

Is this possible?

Hoping for a quick response
Dennis

entry.title: "Error in creating team header" in Manage Teams and Responsibilities for Journal Entry Verification
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am trying to create Team in FIORI app "Manage Teams and Responsibilities for Journal Entry Verification" but app is getting error  "Error in creating team header". I have seen all the flexible workflow configuration but could not find any resolution. 

Please do let me know how to resolve this issue.

entry.title: Adding custom dropdown fields to Standard FIORI "Manage Customer Master Data" Application
entry.content:
We have a requirement to add custom drop-down fields in Standard FIORI Application "Manage Customer Master Data".

Please provide some guidance on how to achieve this.

Thanks,

Brinda S

entry.title: How to I set the UI5 version used in CF?
entry.content:
My MTA Fiori application is deployed to CF and is available in the "HTML5 Appliactions" menu. When I start the application, the latest UI5 version is used.

I want to deploy the application in a way that a specific stable UI5 version is used instead.

I tried to add the following lines to manifest.json and deploy the application, but when I open the browser console and check the UI5 version with “sap.ui5.version”, it is still reporting the latest version.

"sap.platform.cf": {
"ui5VersionNumber": "1.108.x"
}

How can I set the UI5 used in my HTML5 application?

entry.title: Fiori Custom Apps
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I would like to make a @Consumption.semanticObject:'InternalOrder' for a field. However, all apps that have the semantic object "Internal Order" are displayed. Accordingly, I only want to display selected apps. Therefore, my idea is to define the required apps with a new semantic object so that only these are displayed.
My questions would be how I can best solve this.
Maybe create a separate catalog and reference the apps and declare another semantic object?

As an example, I would only like to define "Display internal order" and "Manage internal order" for the field.

Many thanks in advance! 🙂
